summary: Reviewed the requested files only. The four round-1 findings appear closed: manifests/lockfiles no longer carry an `artifact-store` dependency, `setup.sh` now uses vendored `artifacts.py`, `resolveArtifactRoot` preserves legacy `storage_root` fallback, and improver proposals now emit `file://` URIs. I found no remaining dangling `artifact-store` dependency in the reviewed composition manifests/lockfiles.
